title: Billing dispute escalation
summary: Route billing disputes over $500 or involving chargebacks to Finance within 4 hours.
body: Escalate to Finance when: disputed amount exceeds $500, customer threatens chargeback, or refund policy exception is requested. Tag ticket ESC-BILLING and assign owner Finance-OnCall.

title: Security incident triage
summary: Treat suspected account compromise and data exposure as P1 security incidents.
body: Immediately escalate tickets mentioning unauthorized access, credential leak, or customer data exposure. Tag SEC-P1, notify Security-OnCall, and pause automated refunds until cleared.

title: Password reset playbook
summary: Standard self-serve password reset before escalating to identity team.
body: Confirm account email, verify recent login location, send reset link once. Escalate only if MFA lockout persists after two reset attempts.

title: Legal hold requests
summary: Legal and subpoena requests require Legal review before any data export.
body: Never export customer data for legal requests without Legal approval. Tag LEGAL-HOLD and route to Legal queue within 1 business day.
